PICK EM ADMIN
Not connected
ADMIN
Setup
Step 1 — GAS Connection

Deploy pickem-gas.gs as a Web App, then paste the URL below.

Step 2 — Download Player File

This generates a pickem.html with your GAS URL already baked in. Share that file in Discord once — players just open it, type their name, and they're in. No codes, no URLs, no setup on their end.

✅ Player opens pickem.html
✅ Types Discord name → sees this week's games automatically
✅ Makes picks → saved to GAS instantly
✅ Leaderboard updates automatically after you score games
Weekly Workflow
  1. Teams tab → add teams & logos (one time)
  2. Weeks tab → create week, add matchups
  3. Share the player file in Discord (done once)
  4. Players open it, type name, pick teams
  5. Results tab → click winners → Score All
  6. Leaderboard updates automatically

How Weeks Work

Create a week and add matchups. Players see it automatically when they open the player file. Lock a week to close picks. After games, go to Results → click winners → Score All.

Player Picks
📋
Click Load Picks to fetch from GAS.
Enter Results
Tiebreaker — Last Game Total Points

Price Is Right rules — closest without going over wins. Exact guess earns a +1 attribute bonus regardless of weekly result.
